launch_cutline.description: An optional surface renders at a Stable (or LTS) public claim only when it carries a captured, within-freshness-SLO stable qualification packet, complete surface evidence, an owner sign-off, any waiver it relies on is unexpired, and the public claim it backs is itself at or above the cutline. An optional surface that lacks a stable qualification packet, whose packet breached its freshness SLO, whose surface evidence or capability is incomplete, whose waiver expired, or whose backing public claim is below the cutline renders a label below the cutline (beta, preview, withdrawn) and never inherits an adjacent qualified surface's label.

stop_rules.title: Backing public claim narrowed below cutline
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface whose backing public claim is already below the stable cutline inherits that ceiling; the stable claim manifest already holds the claim upstream, so this is expected inheritance rather than a register defect and does not hold publication on its own.

stop_rules.title: Optional surface lacks a stable qualification packet
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface with no stable qualification packet at all cannot back a Stable public claim by riding on an adjacent qualified surface; it narrows below the cutline and publication holds until a qualification packet is authored, captured, and signed off.

stop_rules.title: Optional surface names an unimplemented capability
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface that names a capability the build does not yet implement cannot back a Stable public claim; the surface narrows and publication holds until the capability lands and is re-qualified.

stop_rules.title: Optional surface evidence incomplete
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface whose qualification evidence is incomplete cannot back a Stable public claim; it narrows and publication holds until the evidence is recaptured.

stop_rules.title: Qualification packet breached its freshness SLO
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface whose qualification packet has aged past its freshness SLO no longer carries current proof; it narrows and publication holds until the packet is refreshed within its SLO.

stop_rules.title: Relied-on waiver expired
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface that rendered qualified only because of a waiver loses that authorization once the waiver expires; it narrows and publication holds until the underlying gap is closed or a fresh waiver is granted.

stop_rules.title: Owner sign-off missing
stop_rules.rationale: An optional surface cannot back a Stable public claim without an owner sign-off; it narrows and publication holds until the owner signs off.

surfaces.title: Bring-your-own-key provider routing
surfaces.surface_summary: Opt-in capability that routes model requests to a customer-supplied provider key with the same fallback and quality controls as the bundled providers.

deployment_qualifications.rationale: Qualified on desktop local.
Qualified on remote helper.
Qualified on managed.
Qualified on self-hosted.
Air-gapped deployment requires additional compliance review.

surfaces.rationale: A captured, within-SLO qualification packet, complete evidence, and an owner sign-off back the opt-in BYOK routing capability at the provider claim's Stable label.

surfaces.title: Local model sidecar
surfaces.surface_summary: Optional integration that runs a local lightweight model sidecar for offline inference and pre-filtering.

deployment_qualifications.rationale: No stable qualification packet for local model sidecar on desktop local.
No stable qualification packet for local model sidecar on remote helper.
No stable qualification packet for local model sidecar on managed.
No stable qualification packet for local model sidecar on self-hosted.
No stable qualification packet for local model sidecar on air-gapped.

surfaces.rationale: The local model sidecar lacks a stable qualification packet entirely; it narrows to preview on all deployment targets.

surfaces.title: Remote dev-container backend

deployment_qualifications.rationale: Packet breached freshness SLO on desktop local.
Packet breached freshness SLO on remote helper.
Packet breached freshness SLO on managed.
Packet breached freshness SLO on self-hosted.
Packet breached freshness SLO on air-gapped.

surfaces.rationale: The remote dev-container backend's qualification packet breached its freshness SLO; it narrows to beta until the packet is refreshed.

surfaces.title: Notebook kernel bridge
surfaces.surface_summary: Optional integration that bridges the notebook runtime to a local or remote kernel for data-rich interactive computing.

waiver.reason: Notebook kernel bridge is qualified stable on waiver pending final notebook data-rich surface integration test completion.

deployment_qualifications.rationale: Qualified on waiver on desktop local.
Qualified on waiver on remote helper.
Managed deployment does not support notebook kernel bridge in M4.
Qualified on waiver on self-hosted.
Air-gapped deployment does not support notebook kernel bridge in M4.

surfaces.rationale: The notebook kernel bridge carries a current qualification packet and an active waiver; it renders stable on waiver pending final integration tests.

publication.rationale: Multiple optional surfaces back Stable public claims but are narrowed below the cutline due to absent packets, breached packets, expired waivers, or unimplemented capabilities. Publication holds until these gaps are closed.
